description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly white and silver body accented by dark joints and blue highlights. Its head is spherical with a single circular feature on the front, possibly functioning as a camera or sensor, and is flanked by two dark, ear-like structures. The torso is angular and tapers into a narrow waist, with layered, armor-like plating extending down to form a skirt-like lower body. The arms are long and slender, with articulated joints at the shoulders, elbows, and wrists, and the hands are composed of thin, finger-like appendages. The legs are fused into two elongated, blade-like structures, giving the robot a streamlined, non-humanoid lower half. The overall appearance suggests a design optimized for urban interaction, with a balance of form and function.
description: A sleek, white and silver humanoid robot with a spherical head, articulated arms, and blade-like lower limbs, featuring blue and dark accent details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's spherical head, circular facial feature, articulated arms extended outward, and layered, skirt-like lower body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the robot's narrow profile, the protruding head, and the blade-like lower limbs extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the symmetrical shoulder joints, and the split, armor-like lower body panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slim silhouette, the curvature of the torso, and the elongated lower limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms fully extended horizontally to the sides, legs together and straight, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot is covered in integrated, armor-like panels with a smooth, metallic and plastic finish.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a single circular feature on a smooth, spherical head, with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose; two dark, ear-like structures are present on the sides.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms have visible ball joints at the shoulders, hinge joints at the elbows, and articulated fingers; legs are fused into rigid, blade-like structures with no visible knee or ankle joints.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: One circular sensor or camera on the front of the head; possible additional sensors in the ear-like side structures.
